title: linaria hirta
intro: Linaria hirta, also known as butterscotch or yellow toadflax, is a flowering plant species native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Linaria hirta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its dried flowers can be used in herbal remedies.
